name: Les Baxter
abstract: Leslie Thompson Baxter (March 14, 1922 – January 15, 1996) was an American composer, conductor, and musician. After working as an arranger and composer for swing bands, he developed his own style of easy listening music, known as exotica, and scored over 250 radio, television and motion pictures numbers.

about_quotes.speaker: Plas Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: one of the first arrangers to use me in that capacity... was Les Baxter
about_quotes.doc_title: Plas Johnson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
